<span style="color:#03bd00;">Green</span> <br>
<span style="color:#00aacc;">Blue</span> <br>
<span style="color:#bf4d9e;">Purple</span> <br>
<span style="color:#d98000;">Orange</span> 

{|class=wikitable
|Pyramid
|Ankh<br>Meal Box Size +3,000<br>Travel Speedup +100m
|}

{|class=wikitable
|nito
|ankh<br>Meal Box Size +500, Ma'at Tablet Frag[[File:DOI.png|20px]]<br>Travel Speedup +3h[[File:SDI.png|20px]]
|}

{|class="wikitable"
!<span style="color:#03bd00;">Green</span>
!<span style="color:#00aacc;">Blue</span>
!<span style="color:#bf4d9e;">Purple</span>
!<span style="color:#d98000;">Orange</span> 
|-
|<span style="color:#03bd00;">Green</span>
|<span style="color:#00aacc;">Blue</span>
|<span style="color:#bf4d9e;">Purple</span>
|<span style="color:#d98000;">Orange</span> 
|}
